# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Test PRs from External Contributors

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        id: test

      - name: Post test results as a comment
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v5
        with:
          script: |
            const result = ${{ steps.test.outcome }};
            const comment = result === 'success' ? 'All tests passed! 🎉' : 'Some tests failed. Please check the logs for details. ❌';
            await github.rest.issues.createComment({
              issue_number: context.payload.pull_request.number,
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              body: comment
            });
